notes: Captured by Wave A2 of the HenryCo i18n FINAL COMPLETION pass against current main as the floor.
Combined output of `node scripts/i18n-audit-visible-strings.mjs` plus `node scripts/i18n-audit-visible-strings.mjs apps/hub apps/staff`, deduplicated by file.

This is intentionally a maximum the gate refuses to regress past. Subsequent passes (Wave A1 extraction, Wave B locale fills) decrease this number; the conductor regenerates the baseline in the Wave D closure step.
